verification.notes: Internal replay slice plus the bounded editor loop are verified, including preset-based placeholder creation, snap-assisted drag/nudge, viewport alignment aids for supported placeholder-backed objects, layer reassignment, bounded placeholder width/height edits, layer-local ordering controls, read-only order-position cues, previous/next selection within the current layer, quick session-only layer isolation, session-only viewport zoom/pan/reset/fit controls with transformed-view-safe drag math, duplicate/delete, undo/redo, save/reload, deterministic replay sync, explicit desktop bridge health diagnostics, deterministic Electron bridge smoke, live Electron project load proof, one bounded live-shell inspector edit/save/reload proof, one bounded live-shell canvas drag/save/reload proof for an existing object, one bounded live-shell create->drag->save->reload proof for a newly created placeholder object, one bounded live-shell create->duplicate/delete->save->reload proof for a newly created placeholder object, one bounded live-shell create->reorder->save->reload proof for a newly created placeholder object, and one bounded live-shell create->layer-reassign->save->reload proof for a newly created placeholder object in project_001; live restart and free-spins capture gaps remain.

internalReplay.notes: Validated internal replay slice exists in project_001, now with a bounded editable shell workflow that can create preset placeholders, resize, move, align to the viewport, edit, reorder within a layer, read order position, step to previous/next siblings inside the current layer, isolate a single layer for focused edits, zoom/pan/reset/fit the viewport session-only, duplicate, delete, save, reload, sync, load through a proven Electron preload bridge, and prove one bounded live-shell inspector edit/save/reload loop, one bounded existing-object canvas drag/save/reload loop, one bounded create->drag->save->reload loop for a new placeholder object, one bounded create->duplicate/delete->save->reload loop for a new placeholder object, one bounded create->reorder->save->reload loop for a new placeholder object, and one bounded create->layer-reassign->save->reload loop for a new placeholder object through the real renderer action path.

provenFacts: Replay loader uses internal project data only.
Project_001 is the only validated donor-backed project so far.

The shell can now create preset placeholders, resize, align, edit, move, reorder within a layer, show layer-local order position, step previous/next within the current layer, isolate a focused layer view, zoom/pan/reset/fit the viewport session-only, duplicate, delete, and persist bounded scene objects from project_001 internal scene files.

Save deterministically syncs the replay-facing generated project.json output from the editable internal scene files, including placeholder size, ordering, layer-local navigation-compatible edits, the bounded live-shell persist proof edit, the bounded live-shell canvas drag proof movement, the bounded live-shell create->drag proof movement for a newly created placeholder, the bounded live-shell create->duplicate/delete proof lifecycle result for a newly created placeholder, the bounded live-shell create->reorder proof layer-order result for a newly created placeholder, and the bounded live-shell create->layer-reassign proof layer reassignment result for a newly created placeholder.

The live Electron shell now proves one bounded inspector edit/save/reload loop, one bounded existing-object canvas drag/save/reload loop, one bounded create->drag->save->reload loop, one bounded create->duplicate/delete->save->reload loop, one bounded create->reorder->save->reload loop, and one bounded create->layer-reassign->save->reload loop through the real preload bridge and renderer workflow.

assumptions: This metadata file is the shell-facing project summary until a richer workspace state file exists.
The current bounded editor slice remains intentionally small enough to stay reliable without advanced gizmos, resize handles, or a full asset-creation workflow yet.
unresolvedQuestions: How quickly the project registry will grow beyond a single validated entry.
Which next bounded live-shell proof or editor hardening slice should come after the first real live-shell create->layer-reassign->save->reload proof.
